aria-args.description: CLI argument parsing for Nitpick — reads /proc/self/cmdline and provides flag/value query functions

aria-ascii.description: ASCII character classification and conversion: is_upper/lower/digit/hex, to_lower/upper, digit_val, hex_val

aria-audio.description: Software audio synthesis for Nitpick virtual console — 4-channel mixing, waveform generation via C shim

aria-base64.description: Base64 encoding and decoding for Nitpick

aria-bits.description: Bit manipulation utilities for uint64: test/set/clear/flip, nibble extraction, byte popcount

aria-buf.description: Byte and word packing/unpacking operations for uint64 buffers (little-endian)

aria-clamp.description: Min, max, clamp, abs, and sign for int64 and uint64

aria-color.description: RGBA color packing, unpacking, and pixel transforms for Nitpick

aria-console.description: Virtual 8-bit console address map and frame scheduler — 16-bit memory-mapped address space, pure Nitpick

aria-conv.description: Saturating numeric narrowing and float/int conversion utilities

aria-csv.description: CSV parser and writer for Nitpick — RFC 4180 compliant

aria-datetime.description: Date and time library for Nitpick — timestamps, formatting, components

aria-decision-t.description: DecisionGradientT — two-axis gradient decision construct with time-axis snapshot history

aria-display.description: Cross-platform terminal display library — ANSI/termios TUI primitives, cursor control, raw mode via C shim

aria-endian.description: Byte-swap and rotation utilities — endian conversion, circular bit shifts on uint64

aria-entangled.description: EntangledPair — two coupled DecisionGradients with tilt-axis propagation and joint crystallization

aria-fixed.description: Q32.32 fixed-point arithmetic on uint64: from_int, to_int, frac_bits, add, sub, mul, half, double, gt, eq

aria-freq.description: Frequency/period integer arithmetic: hz_to_ns, ns_to_hz, mhz/hz conversions, baud timing, ms/ns conversions

aria-gradient-field.description: GradientField — spatial decision field driven by a single DGT emitter (LIB-27)

aria-gtk4.description: Nitpick bindings for GTK4 — native desktop GUI toolkit

aria-hash.description: Non-cryptographic hash functions — FNV-1a, djb2, bit-mixing for hash tables, checksums, and seeding

aria-http.description: HTTP client library for Nitpick — GET, POST, headers, status codes via libcurl

aria-input.description: Raw keyboard input for Nitpick virtual console — key detection with SNES-style button mapping via C shim

aria-json.description: JSON tokeniser for Nitpick — byte-level scanning with malloc/free for zero-copy token-type arrays

aria-log.description: Structured logging library for Nitpick — levels, timestamps, formatted output

aria-math.description: Mathematical functions for Nitpick — trig, exponential, logarithm, rounding, and more via C libm

aria-mux.description: Bit-select, field insert/extract, conditional mux, mask operations, and blend for register-map and FSM patterns

aria-mysql.description: MySQL client library for Nitpick — SQL database via C shim wrapping libmysqlclient

aria-postgres.description: PostgreSQL client library for Nitpick — SQL database via C shim wrapping libpq

aria-rand.description: xorshift64 pseudo-random number generator for Nitpick

aria-raylib.description: Raylib bindings for Nitpick — windowing, 2D drawing, input, and text rendering via C shim

aria-redis.description: Redis client library for Nitpick — key-value store via C shim wrapping hiredis

aria-regex.description: Regular expression library for Nitpick — POSIX extended regex

aria-resource-mem.description: Consumable expiring memory cells — configurable read/write/TTL limits with Result-style access

aria-sdl2.description: Nitpick bindings for SDL2 — windowing, 2D rendering, events, and input

aria-socket.description: TCP and UDP socket abstractions for Nitpick

aria-sqlite.description: SQLite3 client library for Nitpick — embedded SQL database via C shim wrapping libsqlite3

aria-str.description: High-level string manipulation library for Nitpick

aria-test.description: Lightweight test framework for Nitpick programs

aria-uuid.description: 128-bit UUID arithmetic utilities — pack/unpack, hi/lo split, comparison, and version extraction

aria-vec.description: 2D and 3D float64 vector math: dot, cross, and length-squared operations

aria-zigzag.description: Zigzag encoding/decoding — maps signed integers to unsigned for efficient varint serialization

aria-websocket.description: WebSocket client/server for Nitpick — RFC 6455 compliant with pure POSIX sockets

aria-toml.description: TOML configuration file parsing with dotted-key lookup, type-safe getters, and serialization

aria-yaml.description: YAML configuration parsing with indentation-based nesting and dotted-key lookup

aria-compress.description: Compression and decompression (gzip/deflate) via zlib for Nitpick

aria-crypto.description: Cryptographic hashing — SHA-256, MD5, HMAC-SHA256 with hex output

aria-url.description: URL parsing, percent-encoding/decoding, and component extraction

aria-mime.description: MIME type detection from file extensions with 70+ registered types

aria-semver.description: Semantic versioning — parse, compare, satisfy constraints, and bump versions

aria-cli.description: Rich CLI output — ANSI colors, bold/italic/underline, progress bars, and banners

aria-env.description: Environment variable management — get, set, unset, with convenience accessors

aria-xml.description: XML parsing with tag lookup, attribute extraction, path queries, and element counting
